_comment: Auto-post body templates per alert source × severity. Loaded by AlertDispatchService at boot; editable without redeploy. Placeholders: {name}, {mag}, {distance}, {direction}, {duration}. Spec: docs/ALERTS_INTEGRATION.md 'Templates per source'. Copy reviewed 2026-04-30 for everyday-language tone — stay imperative + concrete, drop bureaucratic phrasing.

templates.headline: Hurricane warning
templates.body: Hurricane {name} is on the way. Bring loose stuff inside, fill up on water, charge your phones, and look at your evacuation plan now.

templates.headline: Tornado warning
templates.body: Tornado spotted. Get to the lowest floor and an inside room with no windows — right now.

templates.headline: Flash flood warning
templates.body: Flash flood happening now. Turn around, don't drown. Get to higher ground.

templates.headline: Flood warning
templates.body: Flood warning. Move what you can to higher floors. Don't drive through water — turn around, don't drown.

templates.headline: Winter storm warning
templates.body: Winter storm coming. Make sure you have water, food, and a way to stay warm. Power may go out — check on neighbors who live alone.

templates.headline: Blizzard warning
templates.body: Blizzard warning. Stay off the roads. Have a backup way to keep warm, plus food and water. Check on neighbors who live alone.

templates.headline: Dangerous heat
templates.body: Dangerous heat today. Drink water, find air conditioning, and skip outdoor exercise. Check on older neighbors and anyone without AC.

templates.headline: Fire weather warning
templates.body: Conditions are right for fast-spreading fires. No outdoor burning. Pack a small bag with essentials in case you have to leave quickly.

templates.headline: Earthquake felt nearby
templates.body: M{mag} earthquake about {distance}mi {direction}. Look around for damage to your home. Check for gas smell and water leaks.

templates.headline: FEMA disaster declared
templates.body: FEMA declared a disaster in your area. You may qualify for help with housing, repairs, or other recovery costs — fema.gov/assistance

templates.headline: FEMA wildfire disaster declared
templates.body: FEMA declared a wildfire disaster in your area. You may qualify for help with housing, repairs, or other recovery costs — fema.gov/assistance

templates.headline: FEMA disaster declared
templates.body: FEMA declared a disaster in your area. You may qualify for help with housing, repairs, or other recovery costs — fema.gov/assistance
